sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n97586" key="su/gkairos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σύγκαιρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n97586.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of the season</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἄνθη</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0640.tlg001:3:16" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alciphr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.16</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>; <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">seasonable, suitable</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τῇ ὥρᾳ</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anon.</author> </bibl> </cit> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
